content.text: Found 3 API products in contoso-apim: 1) AI Gateway Standard - includes GPT-4o and text-embedding-ada-002 endpoints with 10K tokens/min limit. 2) AI Gateway Premium - includes GPT-4, GPT-4o, and DALL-E 3 with 100K tokens/min limit. 3) Internal APIs - employee-facing REST APIs for inventory and order management.
